Nephrolepis abrupta, commonly known as the abrupt sword fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Nephrolepidaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help to soothe digestive issues and boost the immune system.

The bioactive constituents of Nephrolepis abrupta include flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
